programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Can Kim get rid of her husband's meddling ex-lover? Next Daron says he loves his girlfriend, Jessica, but has never fully ended his relationship with his ex, Sarah. Then Tammy wants her boyfriend, Dave, to stop sleeping with his old girlfriend.

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Chrishon denies he’s engaged to Taiwana with 3 weeks until their wedding. Lauren confronts her ex for leaving her for another woman while pregnant! Dave still wants Leesa’s love.

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Rob hates his brother, Steve, and can't wait to tell him that he's sleeping with his fiancee and she's going home with him! Next Meg will make it clear to her boyfriend that she is serious about her unusual fantasy of having sex with clowns!

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: James is engaged to Amanda but now comes clean about Melanie. Next Jewel competes for her mistress' love when Christa proclaims that she wants the lover for herself!

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Dave says his girlfriend's constant nagging has driven him into the arms of a 72-year-old woman! Next Joe is about to tell his beautiful girlfriend that he had a one-night stand with a shocking person!

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Black wants to leave his fiance Justine to be with a woman named Star. But he's about to find out that Star is actually a man. Then, Jay has to reveal to Brittany the shocking secret that he slept with her sister Donna.

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: After their sex life hit the dumps, Andrew searched for satisfaction and found it with his girlfriends sister! Then Desi will do anything to keep Melissa from leaving her behind, but sleeping with her cousin was not something she planned on!

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Whoever made the saying "you can't have your cake and eat it too" must have been going to the wrong bakery. Our guests are here to get what they want and aren't scared of who they have to run over to get it.

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Josh and Amy will find out today that their partners have been unfaithful. Next Madeline reveals to Andre that she's been sleeping with Diante. Then Quincy is engaged to Callie but she doesn't know that Quincy has been cheating with Amy.

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: John weighs almost 700 pounds and couldn't be happier. HIs girlfriend Kim goes so far as to make him choose between her and a 10-foot long sandwich! He chooses the sandwich.

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Kitty came to the show to pose nude for our audience and a camera man while "fooling around" with her friend, Naomi! Next Gee is here to finally get even with her sister, Jenny, for sleeping with her man.

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show
programme.desc: Stephanie says that ever since she came home from work to find her 1-year-old with a black eye, she has feared that her children's babysitter harms them. Sitter Cheryl denies some serious accusations about a child.

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show
programme.desc: Ivette says she feels like a prisoner in her own home because her boyfriend controls every aspect of her life. Then, Denise claims Kevin spits on her and punches her in the face, but Kevin says that's not the full truth.

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: A Shocking Statement
programme.desc: Today on Steve Wilkos, Vanessa reveals a secret she's been hiding from her boyfriend and Joel takes a DNA test to determine if he fathered Melissa's son!

programme.title: El show de Jerry Springer
programme.desc: Cliff quiere que Anna, la mejor amiga de su novia, los deje en paz. Después, el marido de Kelly le ruega que lo acepte de regreso, pero Kelly no quiere porque ya está con el hermano de su marido.

programme.title: El show de Jerry Springer
programme.desc: Gail quiere más emociones en su vida, por lo que ha estado acostándose con el novio de su mejor amiga. Después, Dave se entera de que su novia de los últimos 3 años tiene una aventura y está dispuesto a todo para recuperarla, incluso ponerse un sostén.

programme.title: El show de Maury
programme.desc: Hoy en MAURY, tenemos a madres y padres muy enfadados en negación. ¡Estos hombres juran que es imposible que sean los padres de los hijos de estas mujeres! Pero, ¿y si tienen razón? ¿Qué respuestas darán los resultados de ADN?

programme.title: El show de Maury
programme.desc: Los invitados del episodio de hoy de MAURY tienen secretos que revelar, pero ¿se arrepentirán de contarlos? Hay relaciones en peligro. Puede que haya corazones rotos. ¿Podrán estas parejas sobrevivir a los secretos que amenazan con separarlos?

programme.title: El show de Maury
programme.desc: Hoy, en MAURY, terminó la espera. Finalmente mostramos los resultados emocionantes de las pruebas de paternidad de ayer. Además, las nuevas parejas están cruzando los dedos para recibir las respuestas que quieren.

programme.title: El show de Maury
programme.desc: Hoy, Marisol regresa por 12º vez para hacer la prueba de su 15º hombre. Luego, Dalyna vino a demostrar que Johnny Mack es el padre de su hijo. Él dice que es imposible porque le parece que el bebé es "demasiado feo" para ser suyo.

programme.title: El show de Maury
programme.desc: Rhonda está segura de que John es el padre de su hijo. ¡Incluso la mamá de John está de acuerdo con ella! Después, Kim y Heather solían ser amigas, pero eso fue antes de que Rick la dejara por Heather. Sin embargo, Kim está segura de que Rick es el padre.

programme.title: El show de Maury
programme.desc: Hoy en MAURY, te pondremos al día con algunos de nuestros invitados más emocionantes. Los resultados de paternidad asombraron a todo el mundo. ¿Qué pasó después de revelar las respuestas y que estos invitados retomaron sus vidas?

programme.title: El show de Maury
programme.desc: Los huéspedes de MAURY han estado ocultando secretos horribles de sus seres queridos y eso les está desgarrando por dentro. ¡Están listos para confesar, incluso si eso les hace perder sus relaciones! ¿Se quedarán o se irán sus seres queridos?

programme.title: El show de Maury
programme.desc: Centavia sospecha que su novio Richard la engaña con Kheisha, la niñera. Después, Kristy le revelará 2 secretos a su novio Matt que podrían terminar su relación. ¡Descubre estos secretos impactantes hoy!

programme.title: El show de Maury
programme.desc: En el episodio de hoy de MAURY, estos hombres dicen que saben que la prueba de paternidad demostrará lo que siempre han sabido: que no son padres de los hijos de las mujeres que los trajeron aquí. ¡Ellas van a demostrar que están equivocados!

programme.title: El show de Maury
programme.desc: ¡Estas mujeres han venido con preguntas urgentes! Kendra quiere que su esposo Richard admita que es el padre de su hijo Y del hijo de su amante! ¡Jevon y su familia no creen que él sea el padre del hijo de Jazmine! ¡Solo MAURY tiene las respuestas!

programme.title: El show de Maury
programme.desc: Grace, la madre de Eddie, no los va a dejar vivir con ella a menos que Kay Kay pueda demostrar que su hijo, Eddie, es el padre de su nieto. Después, Troy niega ser el padre de los cinco hijos de Vanessa.

programme.title: El show de Maury
programme.desc: La furiosa mamá Patty quiere demostrar que el novio de su hija, Dale, un hombre que duplica la edad de su hija, ha sido infiel. ¿Entonces Bam fue infiel a Brianna en su propia cama?

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: Rosaura le devuelve a Luis Mario las tierras y la casa. Él la besa, aunque ella al principio se niega pero al final accede. Eduarda y Camelia se golpean y llega Gabriel a enterarse de todo.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: Luis Mario rechaza a Eva y le dice que se siente mal por lo de su hermana. Cuando se queda solo, piensa en los besos Rosaura, no de Eva.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: Eduarda zarandea tanto a Jimena que la hace caer y comienza a perder sangre. Luisana pide que llamen a la ambulancia. La fiscal no acepta la declaración de Rosaura.

programme.title: Acorralada
programme.desc: Maximiliano ha tomado una decisión definitiva respecto a su divorcio con Marfil, pero ella tiene un plan drástico para evitar que él sea feliz con otra mujer.

programme.title: Acorralada
programme.desc: ​​Diego se entera que Diana fue al hospital a visitar a Maximiliano y toma una actitud agresiva contra ella. Bruna y Octavia tienen una pelea respecto a las consecuencias de los actos de Deborah.

programme.title: Acorralada
programme.desc: Paola ve a Francisco y a Caramelo besándose afuera de la fábrica, por lo que los confronta. Andrés ataca a Gaby y ella le dispara. Gaviota le hace una confesión a Gaby.

programme.title: Acorralada
programme.desc: Gaviota asume la responsabilidad de haber matado a Andrés. Marfil le ruega a Octavia que le ayude a recuperar a Maximiliano y lo visitan para contarle toda la verdad. Gaby quiere declararse culpable por la muerte de Andrés.

programme.title: Amor comprado
programme.desc: Mariana entra muy alterada a ver a Leonora. Doménica sorprendida escucha la conversación, luego Mariana le exige a su madre que no vea más a su padre. Le dice cuánto la desprecia por haberla abandonado.

programme.title: Amor comprado
programme.desc: Margot indispone a Verónica contra Santiago, y también inventa que Elena está embarazada y que Santiago le pide que aborte. Verónica cree todas estas mentiras.

programme.title: Amor comprado
programme.desc: Picos es sorprendido por Ernesto y Willy mientras intenta matar a Luciano. Ambos lo persiguen, pero Picos consigue escapar. La policía escucha las versiones que acusan a Morgana.

programme.title: Amor comprado
programme.desc: Ernesto y Mariana le cuentan a Ricky la verdad al revelarle que Ernesto no es su padre biológico. La noticia es muy dura para el joven. Por otro lado, Natalia compra una prueba de laboratorio.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: Rosaura sigue pidiéndole a Eduarda que se arrodille para que le devuelva todo. Luisana se confiesa con Fernando sobre sus fracasos amorosos con Bruno y con Silvia.

programme.desc: Rosaura le devuelve a Luis Mario las tierras y la casa. Él la besa, aunque ella al principio se niega pero al final accede. Eduarda y Camelia se golpean y llega Gabriel a enterarse de todo.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Chopper, Nami, and Usopp get scared out of their minds when they encounter a graveyard full of zombies! Meanwhile, the rest of the crew gets trapped in super creepy sea web!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: An invisible man turns Nami's bath time into a harrowing experience, and Usopp battles a hall full of haunted paintings with a handful of burning candles!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: While Usopp, Nami, and Chopper seek to unravel the secrets of the haunted mansion, Luffy and the gang do battle with an army of the undead!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy sets his sights on the shadowing-stealing monster known as Gecko Moria, and the zombie army prepares for a night attack led by their perverted, invisible leader!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Usopp, Chopper, and Nami get trapped in a coffin after being slashed by a zombie samurai. Meanwhile, Luffy and the rest of the Straw Hats make short work of some haunted paintings!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: After escaping from their coffin prison, Usopp, Chopper, and Nami do battle with a garden full of adorably dead zombie animals!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: An undead warthog sets her sights on Nami, Zorro and Sanji vanish without a trace, Franky and Robin battle an unbeatable army, and Luffy gets captured!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: A penguin zombie starts acting an awful lot like Sanji, Nami continues running for her life, and Robin and Franky buy some time by blowing up a bridge!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Nami gives love advice to a zombie, Luffy finds himself face-to-face with Gecko Moria, and Robin gets caught in spooky spider web. Things look bleak for the Straw Hats until their skeleton friend lends a hand!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Brook strikes the final blow in his battle with the spider monkey, Gecko Moria's devious plan is revealed, and Luffy's escape attempt leads to the loss of something he can't live without!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Brook tells Franky and Robin the secret to slaying zombies, and Gecko Moria reveals the terrifying monster that will be the recipient of Luffy's shadow!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy's shadow is forced into the body of a monster, Usopp and Chopper get incinerated, and Nami is kidnapped by a zombie who wants to make her his wife!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Gecko Moria's minions struggle with the burden of feeding a giant zombie brought to life by Luffy's shadow. Meanwhile, Brook flashes back to a battle that almost cost him his beloved afro!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The freshly-revived trio of Luffy, Zoro, and Sanji discover that their shadows are missing, and Franky relates Brook's story about a promise he made to a very special whale!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy and the Straw Hats flash back to the heartbreaking story of Laboon the abandoned whale, and Brook's battle with the zombie samurai reveals the reason behind his intense afro love!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy sets out to regain his shadow and convince Brook to join the crew. Meanwhile, Sanji races to stop Nami's zombie wedding before it's too late!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Usopp's naturally negative personality makes him the only Straw Hat who stands a chance against Perona's depressing army of ghosts, and Chopper prepares to do battle against his hero, Dr. Hogback!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: When Brook is overmatched by the zombie samurai, Zoro steps in to help the skeleton get his shadow back. Meanwhile, Luffy prepares for a battle with Gecko Moria, and Sanji interrupts an undead wedding!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Despite his furious attempts, Luffy struggles to land a blow against Gecko Moria, but Sanji fares much better in his passionate attempt to defeat Nami's beastly abductor!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Sanji takes a beating when his opponent suddenly turns invisible, Luffy finally manages to land a blow in his battle with Gecko Moria, and Usopp uses fire to ward off a zombie bear!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: After getting the stuffing beat out of him by a zombie teddy bear, Usopp summons his sharp-shooting alter ego to help him discover the secret to defeating Perona!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Usopp reaches deep into his devious bag of tricks to even the odds in his battle with Perona. Meanwhile, Luffy can't lay a finger on Gecko Moria, and a zombie is less than gentlemanly in his battle with Robin!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: While Franky and Brook watch in awe, Zorro and the zombie samurai wage a sword-slinging battle the likes of which the world has never seen before!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Chopper can no longer contain his fury over Dr. Hogback's evil treatment of his zombie slaves. Meanwhile, Luffy prepares to face the zombie who's wearing his shadow!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Moria's mansion is reduced to ruins as the zombie with Luffy's shadow stalks the Straw Hats! As the walls come tumbling down, Chopper puts the hurt on Hogback, and Nami vanishes right before Sanji's eyes!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: One by one, the Straw Hats attack Oars, but the monstrous zombie appears too powerful to be defeated. Luffy's got his sights set on Moria, but he'd better hurry if he wants to save his crew!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Nami wakes up just in time to find out she's about to marry a zombie, but the special occasion is interrupted by very jealous warthog!

programme.title: Sanctuary
programme.desc: Magnus returns from a trip to find the Sanctuary in chaos and a UN inspection team just hours away.

programme.title: Sanctuary

programme.desc: The team searches for Mark Wilson, who disappeared while trying to prove the innocence of his death-row inmate son, Ricky, scheduled to die in two days.

programme.desc: The team investigates the murder of a professional informant after he's found dead outside an abandoned factory in Red Hook. Also, Maggie reconnects with an old colleague and mentor (Joelle Carter).

programme.desc: After a string of armed robberies target various businesses, the team investigates a suspect who leads them to something much bigger. Also, OA worries about his future when his investments begin to go south.

programme.desc: When an off-duty diplomatic security agent is fatally shot in New York City trying to apprehend someone, the team investigates if there's a connection to his time working in Croatia.

programme.title: Thelma & Louise

programme.title: Hard Eight

programme.title: Titans of the 20th Century

programme.title: Titans of the 20th Century

programme.title: Inventions That Shook The World

programme.title: Inventions That Shook The World

programme.title: Inventions That Shook The World
programme.desc: Though overshadowed by the Great Depression, there is no shortage of ingenuity in the 1930s. The two-way radio gets miniaturized, and the world's first portable walkie-talkie goes on the air.

programme.title: Inventions That Shook The World
programme.desc: War is the driving force behind much of the innovation in the 1940s. The microwave is born after a self-taught inventor realizes that military equipment is responsible for melting a chocolate bar in his pocket.

programme.title: Inventions That Shook The World

programme.title: Inventions That Shook The World

programme.desc: Andi and Lu are excited to celebrate their upcoming wedding with a joint bachelorette weekend in wine country. On the first night, things get off to a rocky start when one of the brides admits that she's never had an orgasm.

programme.title: RiffTrax: Terror at Tenkiller
programme.desc: Follow-up to the rarely seen, totally imaginary films Ennui at Eightkiller and Nausea at Ninekiller, Terror at Tenkiller really brings the goods! And by “the goods” we mostly mean there’s a character named Tor in it.

programme.title: RiffTrax Live: "Manos" the Hands of Fate
programme.desc: This is a completely new riff of “Manos” The Hands of Fate, the Texas-fertilizer-salesman-directed classic made famous by Mystery Science Theater 3000.

programme.title: RiffTrax: Supersonic Man
programme.desc: The stars of MST3K bring their comedic riffing treatment to this low-budget superhero classic. Just like The Pumaman - only better!

programme.title: Total Riff Off Episode 1: Killer Shrimp N' Friends
programme.desc: Killer Shrimp ‘N Friends - no, it’s not a new appetizer platter at your favorite casual dining restaurant, but it IS a smorgasbord of strange creatures, people, and underwear!

programme.title: RiffTrax: RiffTrax Presents Dreamscape
programme.desc: Rifftrax Presents team Janet Varney and Cole Stratton return to the riffing booth after a three year absence to riff another cheesy 80s genre pic!

programme.title: RiffTrax Shorts: At Your Fingertips: Floats (Live Edition)
programme.desc: This short instructs how to build a general TYPE of garbage-craft, a floating garbage craft, rather than focusing on utilizing a specific type of garbage to build a craft. This short is a parody and contains a comedic commentary by RiffTrax.

programme.title: Attack Of The Supermonsters
programme.desc: When stop-motion dinosaurs meet anime superheroes, only one thing is certain: things are about to get dumb as hell! Join Mike, Kevin, and Bill for one of the most unique movies we've ever done, Attack of the Super Monsters!

programme.title: Feeders
programme.desc: When a poorly rendered UFO lands on Earth, the aliens immediately seek out our best and brightest. The aliens proceed to feed on them by waggling around in short bursts so as not to reveal the hand of the Polonia brother currently shaking the puppet.

programme.title: Giant From The Unknown
programme.desc: A sleepy mountain town called Pine Ridge has a big problem: someone's been mutilating their cows. Ah, it must be the giant from the title of the movie, you're probably thinking. Spoiler alert: nope! Join Mike, Kevin and Bill to find out!

programme.title: Kill Or Be Killed
programme.desc: Kill or Be Killed is a cornucopia of wonders, specifically South African martial arts wonders. It's got a long-haired karate hero and a whacked-out plot. Join Mike, Kevin & Bill as they riff or be killed!

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Un delincuente culpa a la responsabilidad que tiene a su familia. Un papá no tiene más opción que reportar a su hijo. Los oficiales descubren artículos interesantes en el auto de un hombre de familia.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Un oficial pide refuerzos por tener desventaja. Un hombre vive más de lo esperado por ayudar al vecino. La policía separa a una pareja casada después de revisar su vehículo.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Un hombre astuto evade a la policía. Unos buenos samaritanos pausan lo que están haciendo cuando ven un crimen violento. Una mujer comete un delito y intenta negociar con los oficiales.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Una persecución a alta velocidad cambia cuando el conductor huye a pie. Los vecinos se enojan cuando los niños hacen ejercicio. Un conductor nervioso se enoja cuando la policía registra al pasajero.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Un delincuente se escapa y busca refugio con su abuela. Una explosión permite que los oficiales saquen un dispositivo. Unos vecinos preocupados rehúsan devolver un perro a sus dueños.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: La policía responde a un fatal accidente automovilístico. La policía interroga a un sospechoso de robo, pero el asegura ser la verdadera víctima. Un hombre dice que un trastorno lo hace huir.

programme.title: Fronteras peligrosas de Latinoamérica

programme.title: Gotham Comedy Live

programme.title: Gotham Comedy Live

programme.title: The Half Hour

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: Having sustained an injury during an alien attack, Carter awakens to find herself abandoned on the Prometheus and trapped. With only her subconscious as a guide, Carter must find a way out of the nebula before it destroys the ship and her way home.

programme.title: Stargate SG-1

programme.title: Stargate SG-1

programme.title: Stargate SG-1

programme.title: The Addams Family

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Gomez decides to bolster Cousin Itt's failing ego by making him the star of a production aimed as a birthday surprise for Wednesday. He hires the great director, Eric von Bissell, who gives Itt elocution lessons, causing a Hollywood star complex.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: While Morticia and Gomez are celebrating their 13th wedding anniversary, she tells Wednesday and Pugsley a bedtime story of how she and Gomez first met. In this episode, Carolyn Jones plays Morticia, Morticia as a 22-year-old, and sister Ophelia.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Wednesday and Pugsley refuse to go to bed until they hear the rest of the courtship story. Morticia resumes the tale via flashback, including the ceremony beginning with Ophelia Frump, Morticia's balmy sister, as the bride.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Romance seems close for Thing, the Addams right-hand-in-a-box, when Gomez's aunt arrives for a visit accompanied by Lady Fingers, her handmaiden. Thing enjoys the visit most because it gives him a chance to hold hands with one of his own kind.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia and Gomez visit Mayor Henson to complain that their property tax is ridiculously low. After the Mayor proves his incompetence by offering a refund, Gomez is persuaded to become a candidate for the office.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: During a welcome home party for Cousin Itt, Morticia notices that the diminutive guest of honor seems to be losing his hair. Uncle Fester experiments with his chemistry set to produce a concoction that grows hair and tries the remedy on Itt.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Wednesday and Pugsley return in tears from trick-or-treating because a neighbor has told them there is no such thing as a witch. Morticia and Gomez plan to prove to the children that they do exist--by summoning a witch to a séance.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Determined to correct the dreadful literature that Wednesday and Pugsley are exposed to, Morticia sets out to create a new literary world. Gomez fears that his wife's first manuscript is so good, that once the publisher reads it he will lose her.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: In need of artistic fulfillment, Morticia takes up sculpting. An art critic views her first endeavor--a three-eyed Gomez statue--and clubs it with his cane. Gomez, who won't have Morticia's heart broken gets a seedy art dealer to buy it.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Pugsley copies one of his dad's old love letters and sends it to his teacher. Miss Dunbar comes to visit the Addams home and confesses to Gomez that no man has ever fallen so in love with her, leading Morticia to pretend to be the jealous wife.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: After Wednesday befriends a new boy her age, Robespierre Courtney, Morticia invites his parents, Mr. and Mrs. Henry Courtney to visit the Addams house for tea. Unbeknownst to them, the Courtney's are hoping to meet a number of the social set.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: There is a neighborhood burglar on the loose, and Morticia has reason to believe it could be Gomez. Morticia decides to probe his subconscious mind for a key to his criminality after she and Uncle Fester discover loot hidden in the storeroom.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia's pet plant Cleopatra gobbles up her favorite photo of Gomez from the family album. When the original photographer is found and asked to make a duplicate picture, it is discovered that he is now with the Department of Motor Vehicles.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Gomez plays host to Don Xavier Molines, a family friend during his childhood in Spain, and his daughter Consuella. Morticia's hospitality is put to the test when Consuella reveals that she has been promised in marriage to Gomez since childhood.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: When Wednesday's and Pugsley's faith in Santa Claus is shaken, Uncle Fester is chosen to back up Santa in case the real St. Nick is too busy to come. However, Fester-Santa gets stuck in the chimney, so each of the other adults fills in for him.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Fester is so smitten upon receipt of a photo of his love, a bearded carnival lady, that he borrows stamp money to mail her a proposal. Morticia dons a beard and poses as the mother to convince Fester that he will have to work to support a wife.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Because she thinks Fester (Jackie Coogan) and Grandmama (Blossom Rock) are spoiling the children, Morticia (Carolyn Jones) hires a governess. Insulted, Fester paints a white line down the center of the Addams house, dividing it in half.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia and Gomez see Fester conferring with TV muscleman Jack LaGrann (Jack LaLanne), and think that Fester is planning a television career. However, Uncle Fester confides to Lurch that he has to go on a secret diet and exercise.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia and Gomez find Grandfather Pegleg's treasure map and summon Captain Grimby. They hope to charter his boat for the treasure hunt. But after meeting the Captain, Morticia is careful to keep the nature of the mission secret.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Ophelia Frump is madly in love with Horatio Bartholomew, the man who has everything, except the truth about her relatives. Morticia, not convinced by Bartholomew, persuades playboy Cousin Itt to stir the embers of his past romance with Ophelia.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Pugsley shocks his parents when he gives up his new atomic reactor as kid stuff and announces that he wants to find his own job. His first try is as a medical assistant to Dr. Bird. He turns up, scalpel in hand, ready to help during an operation.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Grandma Frump (guest star Margaret Hamilton), comes to the mistaken conclusion that her daughter, Morticia (Carolyn Jones), and Gomez (John Astin) plan to pack her off to an old folks home. Actually, they plan to send her to a beauty farm.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia, in order to be part of the National Beautification Program, decides to become a home decorator and offers her services to the neighbors. Next door neighbor, and insurance agent, Joe Digby hires Morticia in hopes of selling them insurance.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Ophelia taunts Uncle Fester into announcing that he is going to join the Peace Corps. Fester feels he's a cinch to be accepted because Gomez plans to pull strings in Washington on his behalf. The entire family agrees to help him study for the exam.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Allyn Joslyn guest-stars as Sam Hilliard, a former truant officer who now heads a private school where Wednesday and Pugsley are enrolled. When Hilliard breaks under the strain of dealing with the Addams children, Gomez buys the school.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Join Jack for an adventure to the Loggerhead Marinelife Center in Juno Beach, Florida where conservationists are working to save endangered sea turtles.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown
programme.desc: Jungle Jack leaves his safari truck behind and treks into the wild, on foot, to meet animals face-to-face. Come along as he encounters, Lions, Bats, Cheetahs, Hippos, Sea Turtles and more!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Join Jack for a journey with the largest land mammals on Earth, the African Elephants, as he travels through their homeland of Tanzania.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Dive in for an epic adventure to the Galapagos Islands. Marine Iguanas, Giant Tortoises, Sea Lions, and more!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Jack and Suzi journey to the remote beaches of Santa Rosa National Park in Costa Rica to look for elusive jaguars that prey on nesting sea turtles.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Deep in the Amazon River basin of Peru, Jack discovers a group of young conservationists working to save orphaned and injured animals at Taricaya Rescue Center.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Animal Adventures
programme.desc: Jack visits the Sao Paulo Zoo, where a small cat-breeding program aims to save many of Brazil's endangered wildcats including the Margay, Oncilla and Pampas Cat.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown
programme.desc: Meet some of the best-dressed animals on the planet! Penguins, Leopards, Painted Dogs, Zebras, Lions, and more!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown: Black & White
programme.desc: What do penguins, skunks and colobus monkeys have in common? These colorful creatures will show everyone why black and white is unforgettable. Join in as Jack counts them down to number one!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown
programme.desc: Jungle Jack meets up with amazing animal moms and the little ones they care for. A jaguar looking after her cub, a baby bear sleeping alongside its mom, a white rhino protecting her calf, a cheetah mom in South Africa and whole herd of elephant mammas!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Gabon is home to some of the wildest beaches on the planet, and Pongara is no exception. Come along with Jack as he witnesses one of nature's most awe-inspiring feats -- one-ton Leatherback Sea Turtles returning to shore to lay their eggs.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown
programme.desc: Check out just how wild a zoo can get. Come along with Jack as he visits some of the most innovative Zoos around the world and meets creatures like, Orangutans, Koalas, Sea Lions, Camels, and more!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown
programme.desc: Animals adapt to survive in some truly wild ways! Camels equipped for life in scorching heat, frigate birds donning red to attract a mate, geckos disappearing into the forest, musk oxen who don’t know the meaning of a bad hair day, and more!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown
programme.desc: Come along with Jungle Jack as he meets up with researchers on the front-lines of animal conservation as they work to protect Elephants, Lions, Rattlesnakes, Bats and more!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown
programme.desc: Come along with Jungle Jack as he meets creatures armed with superb scales, like Nile Crocodiles, Galapagos Tortoises, Thorny Devils, an African Rock Python, and more!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Jack, Suzi, and Kathaleen explore Phinda Game Reserve in South Africa alongside Lions, Hippos, Rhinos, and more!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Jack visits the beautiful city of Quito, Ecuador, and the Quito Zoo for an incredible up-close encounter with a Jaguar and its newborn cub, and sees Andean Condor conservation in action.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown
programme.desc: Whether they cross huge distances in a single leap like kangaroos, or gracefully soar above the waves like dolphins, or escape from predators like frogs, all of today’s countdown creatures are built to bounce, bound and jump around.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown
programme.desc: Come along with the ultimate Jack-of-all-trades as he immerses himself in exciting and sometimes dirty jobs caring for animals. A vet's assistant caring for Rhinos, a Bat researcher in South America, working with a King Cobra in Malaysia, and more!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown
programme.desc: Come along with Jungle Jack for an adventure with rare and unique animals that all wear white. Arctic wolves, beluga whales, polar bears, white zebras and even an albino alligator!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown: Top Cats
programme.desc: From breathtaking tigers to elusive ocelots, lightning-fast cheetahs, leaping leopards, and the rarest lions on Earth. Join Jack Hanna for this Wild Countdown featuring 10 unforgettable encounters with nature’s top cats!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Jack heads into the mystical and mysterious Mashpi cloud forest in Ecuador, where the rainforest meets the Andes Mountains. The forest is buzzing with hundreds of hummingbirds, bats, snakes, and butterflies!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown
programme.desc: The creatures on today’s show are some of the rarest in the wild. Come along with Jungle Jack as he discovers the pink river dolphin, wooly Sichuan Takin, Fiji’s crested iguana, sun-tailed monkey and more!

programme.title: The Love Boat

programme.title: The Love Boat
programme.desc: A provincial woman finds herself hopelessly in love with a paid escort, while Gopher sees the ghost of a man and wife still occupying a room aboard the ship.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Formed in the 1830s to protect settlers against Indian attack, the Rangers became part of the Texas Highway Patrol in 1935. Their role has continued to evolve to keep up with changing times; today it includes sophisticated forensics labs.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Some cases simply can't be solved with current technology or with the evidence at hand. But that doesn't mean they'll remain unsolved forever.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Hiding a body can be difficult; it's sometimes easier to obscure or disguise the circumstances of the death, turning murder into suicide, or pinning the blame on someone else. The truth is told through subtle clues taken from the crime scene.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: This show profiles the work of world-renowned forensic experts as they work to tell the stories of the young men who went to war (from the French and Indian war to Vietnam) and never came back.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Terrorism: Thanks to new technology and, perhaps, the approaching millennium, terrorism is a growing international threat. The Oklahoma City explosion and the bombing of the World Trade Center are just two of the incidents of this growing problem.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: It is difficult to convict a murderer if the body can't be found. But forensic science is finding ways to do it. Devious killers can think up many was to dispose of their victim's remains, but they are often no matches for investigators.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: To the astute detective and forensic specialist, the biggest clues often hide in plain sight, and what seems trivial to some is in reality Critical Evidence.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: They know as much about crime as any crime fighter, or any criminal. They're the crime writers, and through their eyes we see murder most foul.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Arson fires are set for their own sake, or to cover a different crime, such as murder. Think fire consumes all vital clues? Think again. Arson investigators can glean important clues from scorched rubble and ignite the unquenchable flames of justice.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: The show examines cases of poison and deadly chemistry and shows how forensic experts are solving mysterious deaths today and from the past.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: In most homicides, police rely on motive to pursue a murderer. But when the killer is a stranger…the crime may go unsolved for years. It takes a full arsenal of forensic techniques…to trace… a lethal encounter.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Some people do get away with murder, at least for a while. Flush with their success, serial killers murder again and again. But each time they kill, they leave behind a few more clues, which ultimately lead to their undoing.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Black Boxes: Little evidence is left after an airplane takes a deadly plunge from the sky. Investigators' best hope for an answer comes from the flight data recorder known as a “black box.”

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: DNA Analysis: With the advent of DNA analysis, just a few microscopic cells found at a crime scene can be used to put a murder behind bars.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: A former cook in the Navy with Jack comes to town to con his way into a partnership in Jack's Bistro.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: The girls fake a contest to give Jack the rent money he needs for Jack's Bistro. Their good deed turns to disaster when Jack spends the money on a leather coat.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Cheryl asks Jack to father her child, but Jack refuses. Janet thinks Cheryl wants to marry Jack because she's going to have his baby, so she talks Jack into complying with Cheryl's wishes. Guest Star(s): Joanna Kerns

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Larry discovers an answered magazine quiz and he and Jack think one of the girls wants to have an affair with Jack. They take the girls on a weekend trip to find out who answered the quiz so Jack can talk her out of it.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Jack receives $1,000 by mistake from an automated cash machine. He hides it in the couch for the weekend but when the Bank Security arrives to collect the money, it is nowhere to be found.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Jack writes a nasty letter to a famous food critic, thinking the critic is going to give his bistro a ruinous review. When the critic assures Jack the review will be favorable, Jack tries to retrieve the letter from the critic's desk.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Jack is dating a sex therapist who has asked him to keep her job a secret. Janet, concluding she is a prostitute, is nasty to her and no one can understand why - especially when Janet's own father has become so friendly with her.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Jack has two dates, so he talks Larry into posing as him and spending the day with his unwanted date, Janet's childhood friend, who is visiting from out of town.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Jack believes he has won a baking contest that is open only to women. Disguised as "Grandma Tripper," he goes to collect the check and learns that he is a finalist and must bake his cookies for the company's executives to win the prize.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Jack's father visits unexpectedly and resumes his good nature meddling. Jack explodes and tells him to stay out of his life, but when he learns his father has lost his job, Jack gives him the opportunity to be useful.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Terri is up for a promotion and tells Dr. Kenderson she is married to ward off his advances. When he invites himself and his wife over for dinner, Jack poses as Terri's husband while Janet and Larry pose as French-speaking house guests.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: When Jack attends a charity ball with a socialite and loses $15,000 gambling, Larry and the girls attempt to help him recover the money.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: The girls flip over a handsome Englishman who moves in next door, but Jack and Furley become convinced that he is one of London's most sought after criminals.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Janet is thrilled with her new job as an aerobics teacher, and her new boss Tina is thrilled with Jack. When Tina blackmails Jack into being at her beck and call, Larry offers to take her off Jack's hands.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Jack meets an old flame at the park who is seeking advice about her jealous husband. Furley joins them, and they all get poison oak. Later, at Jack's house, Furley tells the husband they were all in the bushes together.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Jack and Furley get locked in a freezer together. Convinced they are going to die, they have a heart-to-heart talk, and Jack confesses that he really isn't gay. Once safe, Jack worries because Furley knows the truth about him.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: The trio plants a stray cat at Furley's door, hoping he'll bend his rules and keep it. When a girl appears looking for her kitten, Furley lies and says he took it to the pound; so Jack and the girls search the pounds and bring home three different cats.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: After a night on the town with his old navy buddies, Jack discovers he has a tattoo on his derriere. When Jack goes to the hospital to have it removed, Janet thinks he is having a vasectomy and Furley thinks he is having a sex change.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Jack offers to model for a beautiful art teacher and finds himself nude in front of her classroom when Furley walks in. Jack begs Furley not to tell, but the secret is out when a nude portrait of Jack appears at the Regal Beagle.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Jack borrows Janet's new car to drive a gorgeous model to a photo session and totals the car on the way home. He pretends to have amnesia in the hospital, but Janet gets suspicious and concocts a plan to help him regain his memory.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: A customer of the flower shop names Janet in his will, and she receives a vase. His nephew, Philip, an art collector, visits Janet, and Jack thinks he lied about the value of the vase and is trying to get it back.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Jack meets an attractive stewardess, Vicky Bradford; but between her father and her dates, she doesn't seem to have time for Jack. Janet announces her engagement to Philip, while Jack is jealous and lovesick.

programme.title: Three's Company

programme.desc: There's only two weeks left to pull in the big bucks and get all the loads to the oil fields. Hugh's impatience with his trainer-driver Phil's slow pace nearly causes him to spin out on one of the steep slopes of the Atigun Pass.

programme.title: Ice Road Truckers

programme.title: Ice Road Truckers

programme.title: T.I. and Tiny: The Family Hustle

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation
programme.desc: The unrelenting team of Top Tier starts the night facing The Dojo Defenders who have recruited Sierra Breeze. The All American Girls are back in the ring battling Las Bandidas. In a Main Event, reigning champion The Beast takes on The Classmaster.

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation
programme.desc: It's an action packed opening match as former champion Penelope Pink battles Tiki Chamorro. Lil J-Boogie makes her way as a singles competitor against Ice Cold. Lana Star's Fabulous Four take on The Tonga Twins in the Main Event.

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Samantha Smart assures her team of The Classmaster and The Disciplinarian are ready to challenge The Mother Truckers for their championship in the Main Event. The All American Girls and Ariel Sky set out to beat their bullies in the ring.

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Princess Aussie and Tormenta battle Laurie and Lindsey Carlson in the opening match. The WOW World Championship Title Match is here as The Beast must prove she can withstand the force of Penelope Pink who has been gearing up to reclaim her title.

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Americana and Santana Garrett take on Goldie Collins and Katarina Jinx. Lil J-Boogie has an opportunity to prove herself against Coach Campanelli. Las Bandidas get their shot at the tag team championship title as they battle The Mother Truckers.

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation
programme.desc: It's a 6-person tag team match up when Lana Star sends her fabulous team of Penelope Pink and Miami's Sweet Heat to fight The Tonga Twins and Tiki Chamorro. The Beast must defend her championship title against Tormenta in the WOW Main Event.

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Gigi Gianni and BK Rhythm take on Crystal Waters and Sandy Shore. It's Stephy Slays turn to battle one of Coach Campanelli's lackeys, Gloria Glitter. In the Main Event, Chainsaw and Siren The Voodoo Doll take on champions The Mother Truckers.

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Jessie Jones is back in the ring for a title shot against The Beast. Teammates Pep Riley and Sasha Sparks vie for a top spot in WOW as they fight Las Bandidas. A rematch is set WOW's biggest Australian Superheroes Genesis and Princess Aussie.

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Top Tier has been dominating in the ring, but now they face the joint forces of Lil J-Boogie, Stephy Slays, and Ariel Sky who want to make them pay for their underhanded ways. In the Main Event, Tormenta faces former WOW Champion Penelope Pink.

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation
programme.desc: The Classmaster and a surprise partner, announced by Samantha Smart, take on the Fierce Sisters. Chantilly Chella and Holidead face off with Las Bandidas. In the Main Event, Lana Star challenges the culprits who ran up her hotel bill.

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation
programme.desc: The Classmaster attempts to put Santana Garrett into detention as they battle in the ring. Also in action is Reina Del Rey, Sandy Shore, Holidead, Genesis and Katarina Jinx. The action heats up and still, so many questions surround WOW.

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation
programme.desc: WOW's new arena is the perfect setting for the unveiling of the first-ever World Trios Championship Titles. In the Main Event, Penelope Pink and Princess Aussie will wrestle to determine the one contender for the WOW World Championship.

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Lana Star is excited about two things...her team, Miami's Sweat Heat, defending their WOW World Tag Team Championships against The All American Girls, and the large amount of money The Mother Truckers owe her. And Lana's coming to collect on both!

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation
programme.desc: David McLane's major announcement - and major reward - sends the locker reeling as the WOW Matchmaker attempts to finally uncover the assailants who attacked The Beast, who finally returns to the ring for the first time since last season.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: A concerned father hires Josh to retrieve his son, a passionate young ideologue whose gift for rousing rhetoric is being used by plunderers to recruit freedom fighters.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Josh's big talk after a dog is shot lands him in big trouble when his browbeating the locals in the saloon about ending the decades-long Carter-Blake feud.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: To track down the cheating tinhorn gambler Johnny Deuce and recover his money, Randall befriends the card sharp's protégé, a 12-year-old orphan boy and card cheat, nicknamed The Montana Kid.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Josh embarks on a mission of mercy when he pleads with the parents of a boy with appendicitis to let the doctor operate.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Josh reluctantly accepts an offbeat assignment: finding a beautiful bride for his bashful buddy Charlie, the homeliest and loneliest man in the West.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: The government employs Randall to portray an escaped prisoner in order to trick his cellmate into leading authorities to the $50,000 he stole and stashed away in a secret location.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Randall finds his prey in the hands of a lynch mob wiping out his bounty.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Who needs enemies with friends like the residents of Rogue City, who celebrate Randall for bringing in notorious killer Jumbo Kane.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Randall is rooked out of his bounty by crafty criminal Hunt Willis and his accomplice.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Against better judgment after losing a quick draw contest and bet, Josh serves as a guide for a dandified East Coast gun salesman who comes west to retrieve and replace a defective gun he sold to notorious outlaw Curly Bill Brocius.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: On the trail of a Cavalry deserter and the horses he stole, Josh rides into a town ruled as the private fiefdom of its autocratic, psychopathic marshal who is holding the horses and deserter.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Hired by a father to bring back the man who killed his son Josh is surprised when he doesn't get paid because he brought the man back alive.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Josh must bring a man back for murder.

programme.desc: Josh brings a wanted man into the Mesa City Sheriff, only to find he killed the sheriff's brother.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Josh is looking for a man who, while trying to rob a bank, is bitten by a rabid dog.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: A man shoots his brother over ownership of their property and blames it on an Indian who reclaimed his horse the man found and stole.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Josh is captured by a corrupt deputy and is forced by the sheriff to work on a chain gang in a gold mine.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Randall is tracking an escape artist who is forced to distract a town, letting three guys rob the bank.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Josh plays detective when he signs on to help an amnesiac discover his identity.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: After watching her father stabbed to death, a grieving daughter wants immediate justice rather than wait for the slower-moving wheels of justice.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Josh is determined to debunk the dire menace posed by a marauding monster that has smashed mining camps, decimated an Indian village, and has the Nugget City residents hiding behind locked doors.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Josh, down on his luck, hires out for $100/day to find a woman - one catch is she may be dead.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Josh brings in \\"Doc\\" Phillips hoping he can lure Clell Fanning out as he has an old score to settle with Clell.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Josh is arrested on a bogus horse-stealing charge.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: To net a thousand-dollar reward and save a friend, Josh saves Tolliver Bender from hanging so he can testify in a nearby trial.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: An attractive woman hires Josh for $1000 to clear her father on a false murder charge in a town that is not very welcoming to Josh.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Josh and Jason are hired to chase a killer who went to Mexico by his brother who is about to hang for a crime his brother committed.

programme.desc: Rebecca mistakenly believes that Grandpa stole the Blue-Eyes White Dragon from her grandfather. Yugi must defend the Blue-Eyes White Dragon to teach her that it's not the power of the cards, but the heart that's in them that counts.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: The two-faced Board of Directors of Kaiba Corporation trap Kaiba inside a virtual reality game. Mokuba recruits Yugi and Joey to free Kaiba from this ultimate game where losing equals death!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: The quest for Kaiba continues with a little help from… Mai? But can YUGI and friends adapt to a virtual world where the rules and strategies keep changing every step of the way?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Yugi and friends rescue Kaiba, but they are still stuck in the game! The only exit is past a Five-Headed Dragon, but in the difficult duel, Joey, Mokuba, and Mailose all their life points!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Duke Devlin defeats Joey and humiliates him in public, forcing Yugi to challenge Duke to a duel. However, this will not be a Duel Monsters duel, but a new game named Dungeon Dice Monsters!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: In exchange for Joey's freedom, Yugi agrees to give up Duel Monsters forever if he loses. Unfamiliar with the rules, Yugi gets off to a rough start.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Yugi uses his innate gaming skills to turn the tables on Duke, but Duke has one more rule to mention: All creatures take up territory on the grid-like board. With no room to summon any new monsters, Yugi's position is helpless!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: After Duke's all-powerful Orogoth The Relentless dices Yugi's entire cadre of monsters into shreds, Yugi only has one turn left before he loses all his heart points!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: An arcane fortune teller steals the Millennium Puzzle and Yugi must defeat him in a duel to win it back.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: The mysterious menace controlling Bandit Keith shatters the Millennium Puzzle into pieces before setting the dueling arena ablaze. Can Yugi put the Millennium Puzzle back together and save the spirit before the entire room is engulfed in flames?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: The origin of Duel Monsters is revealed. Using the magic of the Millennium Necklace, Egyptian historian Ishizu Ishtar shows Kaiba how Duel Monsters was played millenniums ago.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: The spirit of the Millennium Puzzle realizes that his memories of ancient Egypt have faded, but Tea helps him uncover the mysteries of his past.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Yugi learns that he was a powerful Pharaoh who saved the world five thousand years ago, and he must now save the world again.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Joey is cornered by a group of sinister Rare Hunters who force Joey into a duel. If he loses, the Rare Hunters get his precious Red-Eyes Black Dragon!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: It's time to master new rules and monsters; let the Battle City Tournament commence! In the first duel of the tournament, Yugi challenges the Rare Hunter to win back Joey's Red-Eyes Black Dragon.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Yugi figures out the Rare Hunter's strategy to summon the almighty Exodia, but it's too late to stop him. The Rare Hunter already has four pieces of Exodia in his hand, and the fifth and final piece is on top of his deck.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: The psychic duelist Espa Roba defeats Rex Raptor as easy as a chumpasaurus, and Joey's next on his hit list. What chance does Joey have when Espa Roba has the telepathic ability to read all the cards in Joey's hand?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Joey discovers that Espa Roba's extrasensory perception was a hoax, that he's not yet free from Espa's mental manipulations.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: The magician duelist Arkana transports Yugi to the world's most lethal dueling arena where the loser gets sent to the Shadow Realm. Yugi must win this duel or he'll lose much more than his Dark Magician.

programme.desc: Cap'n Dilly's dance party gets lost at sea at night; Brody faces his fear of the dark; the Team Top Wing Cadets must learn to work together to earn their CoPilot Badges.

programme.desc: Swift rescues Baddy; then, the Cadets have to rescue the HQ Command Flyer after Margo uses it to fly off with the Lemon Shack.

programme.desc: Cap'n Dilly and the Cadets build a Pirate Playzone in Ker-Splash Canyon; the Dodos think Brody is the legendary Dodo King and do whatever he says until Baddy McBat takes the crown.
